chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 280 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1. For orders on office objections 2. Hearing of Bail Application 11-08-2023 Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State a/w complainant and SHO, P.S, Moro. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.-Applicant and his counsel are called absent without any intimation. This is an application for pre- arrest bail in FIR No. 199 of 2023 registered at P.S, Moro for offence under Sections 337A(ii), 504, 114, 34 PPC, in which complainant has alleged that applicant Amjad Ali due to a previous dispute inflicted a brick blow on his forehead, causing him an injury falling under Section 337A(ii) PPC, which is verified by Medico-Legal certificate, as pointed out by learned Deputy P.G for the State. Complainant, present, has reiterated the same facts. No case for extraordinary relief of pre-arrest bail is made out in view of reasonable grounds suggestive of involvement of the applicant in the case. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed and the ad-interim pre- arrest bail earlier granted to applicant by this Court is recalled. For the reasons as disclosed in the reply, show-cause notice issued against SHO, P.S, Moro is vacated with warning to remain careful in future. JUDGE Ahmad
